title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler game built on Angular and Phaser.js powered by Gemma 4 that teaches developers about vibe coding and agentic behaviors. The game features NPCs that use the model for code generation and autonomous thinking loops with tool calls, supporting local serving via Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio as well as cloud deployment via Gemini API and Google Cloud.
writeup: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler, built on Angular and Phaser.js and powered by Gemma 4, that demonstrates vibe coding and agentic behaviors for developers. Its NPCs use the model for code generation and run autonomous thinking loops with tool calls, turning game characters into a concrete example of agent design. The project supports local serving through Transformers.js, Ollama, or LM Studio, and cloud deployment via the Gemini API and Google Cloud, so the same build runs on-device or in the cloud.
